memes.prompt: A group of elegant flamingos gathered around a small, ornate table, delicately sipping from tiny teacups with their long necks, feathers perfectly preened. Photorealistic, soft lighting.

A chubby toddler with a determined expression, wearing a messy bib, deeply focused on trying to 'repair' a broken toy car by repeatedly tapping it with a ripe yellow banana. Bright, natural lighting, high detail.

A fluffy cat, forced into a tiny, colorful party hat, sits on a pristine cake, staring directly at the camera with an expression of profound existential dread and mild indignation. Photorealistic, slightly humorous.

A tiny, fluffy baby goat, standing in a lush green field, comically trying to pick up and carry a tree branch that is significantly larger and longer than itself. Bright, cheerful, and photorealistic.

A perfectly golden stack of pancakes, topped with a pat of butter, featuring large, comically surprised googly eyes as a stream of maple syrup pours down its side. Bright, warm lighting, food photography style.

A traditional ceramic garden gnome with a perpetually grumpy expression, standing in a flower bed, angrily shaking a tiny fist at a quick, cheeky squirrel who is raiding a bird feeder. Photorealistic, slightly humorous.

A perfectly straight line of fluffy yellow baby ducklings, walking one behind the other, intently following a small red ladybug as it crawls across the surface of a shallow puddle. Bright, charming, photorealistic.

A young child with wide, confused eyes, clutching a TV remote control, staring intently at a potted houseplant that is visibly vibrating and shaking on a table beside them. Interior, soft light, photorealistic.

A detailed miniature post office interior, where several fluffy chinchillas, wearing tiny postman hats, are diligently sorting tiny letters into small mail slots. Photorealistic, highly detailed, whimsical.

A fluffy rabbit, wearing a white baker's apron and chef's hat, intently kneading a small ball of dough on a miniature floured workbench in a charming tiny bakery setting. Photorealistic, warm lighting.

A person in formal attire, sitting at an elegant restaurant table with white tablecloths, attempting to subtly and discreetly eat an comically oversized dill pickle with a look of mild embarrassment. Photorealistic, humorous.
A very young baby, lying on a soft blanket, looking down at its own feet with an expression of profound confusion and wonder, as if seeing them for the first time. Bright, wholesome, photorealistic.
A cute, fluffy fox cub with large ears, playfully peeking its head out from behind a warmly lit, overflowing bookshelf in a cozy living room, looking directly at the camera. Photorealistic, charming.

A whimsical scene in a backyard with several garden gnomes, holding tiny golf clubs, intently playing miniature golf on a perfectly manicured lawn, complete with tiny windmills and obstacles. Photorealistic, charming.
A sophisticated squirrel, wearing a tiny fedora, standing at a miniature grocery store checkout counter, holding a tiny wallet and looking expectantly at a tiny cashier. Photorealistic, humorous.

A person standing in a brightly lit laundry room, completely defeated and tangled in a large, unmanageable fitted sheet, looking utterly exasperated with their folding attempt. Photorealistic, relatable.
A beaming child, covered in dirt, holding out a mud pie on a pristine porcelain plate with an expression of immense pride, offering it to an amused parent. Outdoor setting, bright, photorealistic.
A fluffy owl with its eyes barely open, wearing a tiny pair of reading glasses perched on its beak, slowly dozing off while sitting on a towering stack of open academic books. Photorealistic, cozy.

A slightly singed, anthropomorphic toaster oven with drawn-on sad eyes, looking down at a single, completely burnt piece of toast lying on a plate in front of it. Kitchen counter, humorous, photorealistic.

A family of raccoons, some wearing tiny beach hats, diligently working together to construct a surprisingly elaborate sandcastle on a busy, sunny beach, looking intensely focused. Photorealistic, charming.
A small green frog, wearing a tiny, ill-fitting golden crown on its head, sitting by a puddle and intently inspecting a discarded bottle cap with wide eyes. Outdoor, natural lighting, photorealistic.

A muscular-looking squirrel, flexing its tiny biceps, proudly holding up an impossibly large acorn above its head like a bodybuilding champion receiving a trophy. Forest background, humorous, photorealistic.
A person with a look of intense frustration and concentration, gritting their teeth, exerting maximum effort to open a seemingly impenetrable child-proof medicine bottle. Close-up, photorealistic.

Three young children in a school playground, seated face-to-face, locked in an incredibly intense and dramatic staring contest, eyes wide open and unblinking, serious expressions. Outdoor, bright, photorealistic.
A small hedgehog, walking carefully across a patch of grass, struggling to carry an impossibly large, fluffy white marshmallow in its tiny paws. Outdoor, charming, photorealistic.

A modern washing machine, its door slightly ajar, comically overflowing with an enormous amount of soap bubbles, while a person stands beside it with a look of utter disbelief and exasperation. Kitchen/laundry room, photorealistic.

A group of majestic white swans, gracefully performing a perfectly synchronized swimming routine in a serene pond, their movements fluid and elegant, creating ripples in the water. Outdoor, beautiful, photorealistic.

A forlorn, deflated birthday balloon, its string tangled messily around a half-eaten, slightly smudged birthday cake on a table, conveying a sense of post-party sadness. Soft lighting, photorealistic.

A very young toddler, wearing overalls, with a look of intense concentration, pushing a miniature toy broom into a surprisingly large pile of dirt on a clean kitchen floor, creating more mess. Bright, humorous, photorealistic.

A congregation of several pigeons, all gathered around a single, perfectly golden dropped french fry on a sidewalk, peering at it with an intense, scientific curiosity. Urban setting, photorealistic, humorous.

A person with a slightly bewildered and dazed expression, having just walked face-first into a perfectly clean, clear glass door, one hand touching their forehead in mild pain. Office or modern building, photorealistic.

A traditional garden gnome, seated on a modern kitchen counter, looking with wide, confused eyes at a sleek, glowing smart home speaker device, as if trying to understand its purpose. Photorealistic, humorous.

A majestic rooster, standing proudly in a rustic kitchen, wearing a pristine chef's hat, gesturing with a wing towards a beautifully laid-out breakfast spread of eggs and bacon. Warm lighting, photorealistic, charming.

A young child with a mischievous grin, attempting to very subtly 'hide' a colorful, scribbled crayon drawing on a refrigerator by carefully placing a magnet directly over the most incriminating part. Kitchen, bright, photorealistic.

A slow-moving sloth, wearing a tiny, crooked party hat, very, very slowly and reluctantly blowing out the single candle on a small birthday cake, looking utterly unenthusiastic. Photorealistic, humorous.

A bright orange traffic cone, looking out of place and slightly melancholic, sitting alone on a wide, deserted sandy beach as the sun sets in the background, casting long shadows. Serene, unexpected, photorealistic.

Several prairie dogs, standing upright in a close circular huddle, appearing to be engaged in a very serious and hushed conversation, their tiny paws gesturing subtly. Open grassland, bright, photorealistic.
A person smiling for a selfie, but with one finger subtly trying to dislodge a visible piece of spinach from their front teeth, eyes wide with mild panic. Close-up, photorealistic, humorous.

A young child, kneeling beside a fishbowl, holding up a colorful picture book to a pet goldfish, pointing at the pages with a very serious and encouraging expression. Home interior, wholesome, photorealistic.

A small, determined mouse, wearing a tiny backpack, meticulously pushing an impossibly large block of cheese on a miniature skateboard across a clean kitchen floor. Photorealistic, charming, whimsical.

A couple on a first date, seated at a restaurant table, the man leaning in with a forced smile attempting small talk, while in the background, a loud waiter vigorously sings 'Happy Birthday' to another table, making eye contact. Photorealistic, slightly cringey.

A close-up of a brightly colored, overly polite yet clearly passive-aggressive office memo tacked to a bustling office bulletin board, with specific phrases underlined, obviously targeting an individual. Photorealistic, office environment.

A person in the driver's seat, grimacing in concentration as they attempt a difficult parallel park, while their date in the passenger seat subtly braces for impact, wide-eyed with fear and regret. Street scene, night, photorealistic.

A dishevelled person, wearing sunglasses indoors, hunched over a laptop at a cluttered home office desk, surrounded by empty coffee mugs, painkiller packets, and a half-eaten greasy breakfast. Morning light, photorealistic, relatable.

A person confidently walking out of a public restroom, oblivious to the long stream of toilet paper trailing elegantly from their shoe, while passersby subtly try to suppress smiles. Public hallway, photorealistic.

A corporate meeting room with a large table, where several professionals are seated, appearing to pay attention to a speaker, but with their hands discreetly below the table, illuminated by the glow of their smartphones. Photorealistic, office environment.
A person with a look of existential despair, standing in a dimly lit kitchen, staring into a completely empty, pristine refrigerator, reflecting on poor grocery decisions. Photorealistic, relatable.

A close-up of a smartphone screen showing a dating app, displaying a very cringeworthy, overly confident, and poorly punctuated opening message being typed by a person's thumbs in the foreground. Photorealistic, common scenario.

A frustrated person, sitting on the floor amidst a chaotic pile of unfinished flat-pack furniture pieces, confusing instruction manuals, and scattered tools, with a single screw held up in bewilderment. Home interior, photorealistic.

A person seated at a kitchen table, eyes wide with horror, holding a large credit card bill, one hand dramatically clutching their forehead in utter disbelief at the total amount. Home interior, dramatic lighting, photorealistic.

A person carefully posing in a picturesque exotic location (e.g., in front of a famous landmark), holding their phone to take a 'candid' selfie, clearly directing their own relaxed expression. Bright, travel photography style, photorealistic.

A broken coffee machine with a hastily written 'OUT OF ORDER' sign taped to it, surrounded by a small queue of tired, glassy-eyed office workers looking like desperate zombies in need of caffeine. Office kitchen, photorealistic.

A couple standing stiffly in a modern kitchen, backs turned slightly to each other, both staring intensely at a single dirty dish in an otherwise spotless sink, radiating passive-aggressive tension. Photorealistic, domestic.

A person on a video conference call, mid-sentence with an animated expression, suddenly realizing their microphone has been muted the entire time, their eyes widening in mortification. Laptop screen view, photorealistic.

A person, trying too hard to impress their date, awkwardly attempting to juggle two apples in a casual restaurant setting, one apple already wobbling precariously, while their date looks unimpressed. Photorealistic, slightly cringey.

An office employee, slumped down in their chair, clearly asleep, with their head mostly obscured by a large computer monitor and a strategically placed potted plant, hoping to go unnoticed. Photorealistic, office cube.

A person, looking earnest, carefully following a complex recipe book for a 'gourmet meal,' but the ingredients laid out on the counter are distinctly from processed, packaged foods, like instant ramen and cheese slices. Kitchen, humorous, photorealistic.

A single person standing awkwardly alone at a bustling party, their face illuminated by the glow of their smartphone, pretending to be deeply engrossed in a text to avoid eye contact or conversation. Dark, party lighting, photorealistic.

A person with a determined but slightly desperate expression, tightly wrapping several layers of silver duct tape around a actively dripping kitchen faucet, clearly hoping for a miracle. Kitchen sink, photorealistic.

One partner holding a clumsily wrapped, very obviously shaped gift (e.g., a clearly visible guitar neck sticking out), while the other partner feigns an expression of utter astonishment and delight. Living room, humorous, photorealistic.

A person standing in a beautiful, remote natural landscape (e.g., top of a mountain), holding their smartphone high above their head, desperately waving it around in search of a non-existent cell signal. Outdoor, scenic, humorous.

A close-up of a smartphone screen showing a person's thumb hovering over the 'unlike' button of a very old, embarrassing social media post belonging to their crush's ex, their face in the reflection wide with panic. Screen glow, photorealistic.

A corporate video call screen showing a professional speaking, while directly behind them, a cat is gracefully knocking over a stack of books, or a child is comically running past in a superhero cape. Screen capture style, humorous, photorealistic.

A person standing in front of an open microwave, staring with utter bewilderment and disappointment at a strangely textured, barely edible-looking meal on a plate inside it. Kitchen, soft lighting, photorealistic.

A person seated at a dinner table, making eye contact and smiling at their date, but their free hand is subtly hidden below the table, illuminated by a smartphone screen displaying their date's social media profile. Restaurant setting, photorealistic.

An office employee, beaming with self-satisfaction, carrying a comically oversized ceramic mug that boldly declares 'WORLD'S BEST BOSS' into a busy office, walking past confused coworkers. Office environment, humorous, photorealistic.

A person in a crowded public space (e.g., subway, shopping mall), discreetly attempting to check if their pants fly is open, using a series of subtle, awkward movements while trying to appear casual. Photorealistic, urban.

A person dotingly stroking their pet (e.g., cat, dog) with intense affection, making cooing noises, while their human partner sits just a few feet away, looking visibly miffed and ignored. Cozy living room, photorealistic, humorous.

A close-up of a paper tray of a modern office printer, with several crumpled pieces of paper jammed inside, while a frustrated person's face, contorted in an angry stare, looms in the background. Office setting, photorealistic.

A person with a red face and bulging neck veins, struggling with all their might to twist open a stubborn jar of pickles, the lid completely unyielding to their extreme efforts. Kitchen, close-up, photorealistic.

A close-up of a smartphone screen showing a text message with an obvious, embarrassing typo sent to a group chat, with a person's finger hovering over the delete button, eyes wide in horror. Screen glow, photorealistic.

A person looking bewildered and defeated, holding up a freshly ironed shirt that now has an even more complex and permanent pattern of wrinkles pressed into it, clearly worse than before. Laundry room, photorealistic.

An office employee, leaning against a cubicle wall, staring at a brightly colored 'motivational' corporate poster filled with buzzwords and corporate jargon, their face a mask of utter confusion and bewilderment. Office setting, photorealistic.

A close-up of a smartphone screen showing a dating app profile, with a person's hand frozen in mid-air, eyes wide with horror as they realize they just accidentally swiped left on their perfect match. Screen glow, photorealistic.

A person on a crowded wedding dance floor, attempting to execute 'cool' dance moves with extreme confidence, but their movements are completely out of sync, awkward, and drawing stares. Wedding reception, photorealistic.

A person in an outdoor setting (e.g., campsite), battling a strong gust of wind, desperately trying to assemble a flimsy tent that is flapping and collapsing around them, their face a picture of pure frustration. Outdoor, humorous, photorealistic.

A person standing in a modern living room, yelling loudly and exasperatedly at a sleek smart speaker, which has just responded with a completely irrelevant answer to a very simple command. Home interior, photorealistic.

A person in a chaotic kitchen, covered in flour and various food splatters, holding a complex recipe book with a look of overwhelmed determination, surrounded by dirty pots, pans, and spilled ingredients. Home kitchen, photorealistic.

An office employee, caught in the act, subtly stuffing their pockets with free office snacks (e.g., mini candy bars, bags of chips), their eyes wide with guilt as a coworker observes them. Office breakroom, photorealistic, humorous.

A single person sitting on a park bench or in a cafe, trying to subtly avert their gaze, looking visibly uncomfortable as an overly affectionate couple next to them engages in an intense public display of affection. Outdoor/cafe, photorealistic.

A single, bright yellow rubber duck, looking comically small, floating precariously on enormous, dark, turbulent waves in a vast and desolate stormy ocean under a dramatic sky. Surreal, photorealistic, cinematic.

A fully articulated skeleton, wearing a tiny, brightly colored party hat, sitting alone at a small, dimly lit table, staring at a single, untouched slice of birthday cake with a forlorn expression. Dark humor, photorealistic.

A person staring blankly at a receipt for a seemingly insignificant purchase, contemplating the meaning of life. Their expression conveys profound existential dread, questioning fundamental existence. Close-up, soft, introspective lighting, photorealistic.

A comically giant, slightly dishevelled, fluffy white rabbit with glowing red eyes, slowly rising into view outside a child's bedroom window at night, its immense size filling the frame. Dark, eerie, yet absurdly funny, photorealistic.

A spherical glass fishbowl, containing a single curious goldfish, inexplicably floating through the vacuum of outer space, with the blue and white marble of Earth visible in the background. Surreal, high contrast, photorealistic.

A group of stern-faced businessmen in full suits and ties, seated around an opulent boardroom table, completely submerged underwater, breathing from tiny, hidden scuba tanks, with fish swimming past. Surreal, photorealistic.

A person, disheveled and frantic, desperately trying to navigate an endless, labyrinthine maze constructed entirely from identical grey office cubicle walls, their face a mask of growing despair. Overhead shot, high contrast, photorealistic.

A small, once vibrant houseplant, visibly wilting and dying, almost completely buried under an impossibly tall, precariously balanced stack of brightly colored self-help books. Gloomy lighting, indoor, photorealistic.

A person walking down a deserted city street at night, completely unaware of a silent, unmoving flock of identical mannequins, all with wide, unsettlingly fixed smiles, observing them from doorways and windows. Eerie, photorealistic.

A single, glowing green traffic light, standing inexplicably upright in the middle of a sprawling, empty desert landscape under a starry night sky, with no roads or signs around. Surreal, stark, cinematic, photorealistic.

memes.alt: Hot dog bun floats to space
memes.prompt: A perfectly golden, empty hot dog bun, strangely buoyant, slowly ascending into the dark expanse of outer space, tied to a cluster of tiny, brightly colored party balloons. Whimsical, surreal, photorealistic.

A small group of disgruntled pigeons, wearing tiny, hand-drawn protest signs (e.g., 'SEED NOW!'), angrily picketing around an empty bird feeder in a suburban backyard. Humorous, photorealistic, slightly absurd.

A person with a defeated and weary expression, standing alone in a sterile office elevator, looking out at the closing doors as it endlessly ascends and descends, devoid of floor buttons or escape. Photorealistic, unsettling.

A comically large, crudely made human-sized sock puppet with button eyes, sitting perfectly still and upright in a cozy living room armchair, silently staring at the back of a person watching TV, unseen by them. Eerie, humorous, photorealistic.

A bright, sunny street scene, but directly overhead, a single enormous cloud, clearly shaped like a grumpy human face, is raining down tiny, perfectly formed sad tears onto the pavement below. Surreal, vivid, photorealistic.

A majestic bald eagle, wearing tiny safety glasses, standing upright in a sparkling, futuristic recycling facility, meticulously sorting plastic bottles from paper with its beak. Surreal, humorous, photorealistic.

A circle of traditional garden gnomes, their faces unusually serious, gathered around a small, flickering candle in a dimly lit garden shed, holding hands for a miniature seance. Eerie, humorous, photorealistic.

A close-up of a computer monitor displaying a perpetually spinning, buffering loading icon, with a person's reflection in the screen, their face contorted in a silent scream of existential crisis. Dim room, photorealistic, unsettling.

A comically oversized, anthropomorphic housefly, wearing a perfectly tailored miniature business suit and tie, standing at the counter of a bustling urban coffee shop, attempting to order a latte. Absurd, humorous, photorealistic.

A large, mature tree, growing entirely upside down in a lush green field, its gnarled roots reaching towards the sky like branches, while its leafy crown is buried deep beneath the earth. Surreal, vibrant, photorealistic.

A fluffy cat, wearing a tiny leather jacket and sunglasses, behind the wheel of a miniature, souped-up sports car, driving through a suburban neighborhood with an expression of profound boredom. Humorous, photorealistic, action shot.

A single, forlorn white sock, looking weathered and abandoned, sitting upright on a small, deserted tropical island beach, gazing wistfully out at the vast, empty ocean. Humorous, slightly poignant, photorealistic.

A person with a look of profound regret and despair, watching an old, grainy VHS tape playing on a vintage TV, which shows a montage of their own past life choices, clearly leading to bad outcomes. Dim lighting, nostalgic yet unsettling, photorealistic.

A perfectly groomed chimpanzee, wearing a neat butler's uniform, standing in a dimly lit, opulent mansion, holding a silver platter on which rests a realistic, but clearly prop, severed human hand. Darkly humorous, unsettling, photorealistic.

A colossal, majestic humpback whale, with its barnacled body gleaming, swimming effortlessly through a sea of fluffy white clouds high above a sprawling, sunlit metropolis. Surreal, breathtaking, photorealistic.

Several shopping carts, each with drawn-on angry or determined faces, silently and slowly moving in unison across a dark, empty supermarket parking lot, attempting a coordinated escape. Eerie, humorous, photorealistic.

A close-up of a very old, moss-covered gravestone in a gloomy cemetery, with a comically oversized, brightly colored 'KICK ME' sign clumsily taped to its back. Dark humor, atmospheric, photorealistic.

A person's face, tired and glazed over, illuminated by a computer screen, on which an endless, repeating loop of generic, cheerful stock photography images (e.g., people laughing at salad) plays relentlessly. Office setting, photorealistic.

A small, grotesque yet oddly charming goblin, wearing miniature striped pajamas and a nightcap, sitting on the edge of a child's bed, holding a picture book and reading a bedtime story with a surprisingly gentle expression. Eerie, whimsical, photorealistic.

A vibrant sunset sky, where instead of birds, a large flock of shimmering fish (e.g., mackerel, tuna) are gracefully flying in formation, silhouetted against the colorful horizon. Surreal, beautiful, photorealistic.

A normal suburban house, but from its roof, a colossal, impossibly large broccoli stalk has violently erupted, tearing through the shingles and reaching towards the sky. Surreal, humorous, photorealistic.

A desolate backyard swing set, with a worn, headless doll sitting perfectly upright in one of the swings, gently swaying back and forth in a faint breeze, its empty neck staring forward. Eerie, melancholic, photorealistic.

A person kneeling by a perfectly still, inky black puddle on a dark street, staring intently at its surface, trying to find their reflection, but it shows absolutely nothing, just endless blackness. Dark, unsettling, photorealistic.

A person sitting on a toilet in a public bathroom stall, looking up with wide, terrified eyes at a pair of comically oversized, disembodied googly eyes slowly peering over the top of the stall door. Humorous, jump scare, photorealistic.

A majestic waterfall, but instead of falling downwards, its water is powerfully flowing upwards into the sky, defying gravity, culminating in a turbulent mass of white clouds. Surreal, breathtaking, photorealistic.

A circle of traditional garden gnomes, their faces grim and concentrated, playing a serious chess tournament on a miniature chessboard in a mystical, foggy forest, surrounded by moss and tiny mushrooms. Whimsical, eerie, photorealistic.

A comically oversized, brightly lit birthday candle, casting long shadows, stuck into a single, very small and lonely cupcake, sitting on a pristine white pedestal in the center of a vast, empty, dimly lit room. Humorous, melancholic, photorealistic.

A person sitting alone in a drab, sterile waiting room, staring with a look of profound despair at a wall clock whose hands are visibly stuck, perpetually displaying the same unmoving time. Fluorescent lighting, unsettling, photorealistic.

A terrified mailman, dropping his mailbag, running frantically down a suburban street, being fiercely pursued by an aggressive flock of bright pink plastic garden flamingos that have inexplicably come to life. Absurd, humorous, photorealistic.

A person's bare hand, reaching out from the open door of a spinning washing machine, perfectly holding up a freshly laundered, impeccably folded white shirt against the swirling suds inside. Surreal, clean, photorealistic.

3: This is my villain origin story.
My brain at 3 AM: *static noise*.
Just embraced the goblin mode.
The feral urge to destroy.
Unsupervised and fully caffeinated.
I'm not okay, I'm just existing.

The void stares back, and it's me.
